name: mascon-lead-finder
description: Mascon-branded Netlify lead research tool using public government data sources.

scripts.check: node --check app.js && node --check shared/presets.mjs && node --check netlify/functions/search-leads.mjs && node --check netlify/functions/lib/utils.mjs && node --check netlify/functions/lib/pipeline.mjs && node --check netlify/functions/connectors/ct-registry.mjs && node --check netlify/functions/connectors/ny-registry.mjs && node --check netlify/functions/connectors/nppes.mjs && node --check netlify/functions/connectors/epa-echo.mjs && node --check netlify/functions/connectors/fmcsa.mjs && node --check netlify/functions/health.mjs
